name: reset_methodology
full_help:
reset_methodology

Description: 
Remove Methodology report

Syntax: 
reset_methodology  [-name <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-name]     Methodology result name
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Methodology, Report

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
